image_prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic image of a very serious, intelligent-looking golden retriever wearing a miniature, perfectly tailored tweed suit and a small monocle. The dog is standing behind a podium made of polished dark wood, with a vintage microphone in front of it. It looks like it's about to deliver a profound, philosophical speech. Above the dog's head, integrated into a formal banner or floating in elegant script, is the text 'Cães latem.' The background is a dimly lit, grand library with towering bookshelves. Cinematic lighting, dramatic, slightly whimsical.
caption: Algumas verdades são tão fundamentais que até os nossos amigos de quatro patas as sabem! 🐾 Qual a sua verdade inegável do dia? Compartilhe nos comentários! #VerdadesIncontestáveis #CãesSabem #Obviedades #HumorCanino #FatoOuMito
